summary: Completed testing of quote threshold update (150m² -> 120m²) and admin quote management dashboard. All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: QUOTE_THRESHOLD_DEFAULT correctly set to 120 in /app/backend/routes/shop.py line 1851
GET /api/shop/products/{id}/quote-status correctly shows quote button at 120m²
GET /api/shop/admin/quotes returns list with pagination, status_counts, and filtering
GET /api/shop/admin/quotes/stats/summary returns dashboard stats (total, pending, quoted, accepted, value, conversion_rate)
GET /api/shop/admin/quotes/{quote_id} returns full quote details with status_history
PUT /api/shop/admin/quotes/{quote_id} updates status, quote_price, quote_notes, valid_until with status_history tracking
DELETE /api/shop/admin/quotes/{quote_id} deletes quote and returns 404 for non-existent
Admin QuoteRequests.js properly displays stats cards, filterable table, detail modal, and update modal
Frontend product page shows 'Request Quote' button at 120m² with 'For orders over 120m²' message
seed_data_creation: Used existing quotes QR-01001 through QR-01004 for testing. Updated QR-01001 to 'quoted' with £5000, QR-01002 to 'accepted' with £4500, QR-01003 to 'quoted' with £5750
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quote threshold is now 120m² (changed from 150m²). Admin quote dashboard at /admin/quote-requests is fully functional with view, update, delete capabilities. 4 test quotes exist in database: QR-01001 (quoted), QR-01002 (accepted), QR-01003 (quoted), QR-01004 (pending).

tests_executed.notes: Returns list of quotes with pagination and status_counts
Returns total_quotes, pending, quoted, accepted, declined, total_accepted_value, conversion_rate
Returns detailed quote info including status_history

tests_executed.test: PUT /api/shop/admin/quotes/{quote_id} update to quoted with price
tests_executed.notes: Updates status, quote_price, quote_notes, valid_until successfully
Deletes quote and verifies with GET returning 404

tests_executed.test: Frontend: Admin Quote Requests page loads
tests_executed.notes: Page shows stats cards, filter buttons, search, and quotes table
Shows Total Quotes, Pending, Quoted, Accepted, Accepted Value
Modal shows product info, customer details (name, email, phone, company, postcode), project details
Modal shows status dropdown (5 options), quote price input, valid until date, notes textarea
Successfully updated QR-01003 to quoted with £5750, toast notification shown, table refreshed
Shows Add to Cart button (below 120m² threshold)
Shows 'Big Project? Request a Custom Quote' notice with 'For orders over 120m²' message

quote_threshold_update.verification: API returns threshold=120, frontend shows quote button at 120m²

admin_quote_endpoints.GET /api/shop/admin/quotes: List quotes with pagination, filtering by status
admin_quote_endpoints.GET /api/shop/admin/quotes/{id}: Detailed quote info by ID or quote_ref

admin_ui_components.stats_cards: 5 cards: Total, Pending, Quoted, Accepted, Accepted Value
admin_ui_components.filter_buttons: 6 buttons: All, Pending, Quoted, Accepted, Declined, Expired
admin_ui_components.quotes_table: 8 columns: Reference, Customer, Product, Quantity, Status, Quote Price, Date, Actions
admin_ui_components.action_buttons: View (Eye icon), Edit (Pencil icon), Delete (Trash icon)
admin_ui_components.detail_modal: Shows full quote info with customer details and project info
admin_ui_components.update_modal: Status dropdown, Quote Price input, Valid Until date, Notes textarea
